tasks.title: Assist wheelchair access at Gate E elevator
Check concession lines at East Plaza
Deploy signs for Gate D exit paths

equipment.name: Handheld Ticket Scanners
issues: Scanner #12: Calibration error at Gate B
Scanner #45: Laser timeout at Gate F

scanners.reboot: Hold POWER + SCAN for 10 seconds. Release when green light flashes. Calibration resets automatically on boot.
scanners.offline: Verify scanner is connected to FIFA-STA-VOL secure Wi-Fi. Check active token validation inside the Settings pane of the scanner app.
scanners.laser: Clean the scan window with microfiber. If error persists, replace rechargeable battery pack.

radios.static: Ensure radio is set to Channel 4 (Command & Ops). If signal is poor, elevate antenna or move 5 meters away from massive concrete structural columns.
radios.battery: Red blinking light indicates charge is under 15%. Swap with a charged spare battery unit at the volunteer command trailer.
